zh.Diocese of Dublin, Leinster, Ireland: 愛爾蘭迪 本 度布林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Diarmait MacMáil na mBó King of Leinster and Ireland於大約0995年出生在愛爾蘭迪 本 度布林時，他的父親Donnchad Mâael Na Mbâo   (O'CHEINNSELAIG) Murchada36歲，母親Aife Ingen Gilla Patraic31歲。他於1034年與Darbforgaill O'Brien在愛爾蘭萊音斯特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1072年2月7日在愛爾蘭享年78歲。

zh-hans.Diocese of Dublin, Leinster, Ireland: 爱尔兰迪 本 度布林
zh-hans.slain by the Meath men at Donlah: 澳大利亚昆斯藍德米亞斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Diarmait MacMáil na mBó King of Leinster and Ireland于大约0995年出生在爱尔兰迪 本 度布林时，他的父亲Donnchad Mâael Na Mbâo   (O'CHEINNSELAIG) Murchada36岁，母亲Aife Ingen Gilla Patraic31岁。他于1034年与Darbforgaill O'Brien在爱尔兰萊音斯特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1072年2月7日在爱尔兰享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: na
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Sung, Kwang, Sang, Seung, Byung, Chong, Jae Eun, Jin, Song, Chang, Chul, Hong, Hyo, Seong, Yong, Yoon, Young, Young Man, Chong Ho, Chong Sik, Dong In, Doyoung, Hae.

Korean: there is only one Chinese character for the Na surname. Some sources indicate that there are 46 different Na clans, but only two of them can be documented, and it is believed that these two sprang from a common founding ancestor. The Na clan's founding ancestor, Na Pu, migrated from China sometime during the mid seventh century and settled in the Naju area.

variants.name: Lan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Feng, Hongjie, Jianqing, Jin, Wei, Xiao, Chan, Chi, Chi Keung, Chieh, Chung-Wen, Dong.  Vietnamese Bui, Buu, Dung, Duong, Ha, Hao, Hoa, Hung, Lan, Mai, Nguyen, Nho.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 藍, meaning ‘blue’ in Chinese: (i) from the first element of the placename Lan Tian (藍田), the name of a fief (located in present-day Shaanxi province) granted to a noble from the state of Qin during the Warring States period (475–221  BC ). (ii) from the placename Lan (藍), the name of a fief (located in Hubei province) granted to a noble in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin or Cantonese form of the surname 蘭, meaning ‘orchid’ in Chinese: (i) from the personal name Lan (蘭), which was the personal name of Duke Mu of Zheng (ruler of the state of Zheng, 648–606  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Wu Luo Lan (烏落蘭) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to a family from South Huns (48–216  AD , located in northern China).

nameMeanings.name: mBó
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Central African (mainly Equatorial Guinea and Gabon; also M'ba): unexplained.

variants.name: Mbah
meanings: African (mainly Nigeria and Cameroon): variant of   Mba  .

nameMeanings.name: Diarmait
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Earlier Diarm(u)it, of uncertain derivation; perhaps from dí ‘without’ + airmit ‘injunction’ or airmait ‘envy’. See also Dermot .

variants.name: Diarmuid
meanings: Earlier Diarm(u)it, of uncertain derivation; perhaps from dí ‘without’ + airmit ‘injunction’ or airmait ‘envy’. See also Dermot .

variants.name: Dermot
meanings: Anglicized form of the Irish name Diarmaid , now also used elsewhere in the English-speaking world. In Irish legend, Diarmaid was the lover of Gráinne, who had been promised to the ageing hero Finn mac Cumhaill, leader of the Fianna. The lovers eloped, but were pursued for sixteen years by Finn; according to one version of the story, Diarmaid was eventually killed by a wild boar and Gráinne died of grief.

en.lifeSummary: When Diarmait MacMáil na mBó King of Leinster and Ireland was born about 0995, in Diocese of Dublin, Ireland, his father, Donnchad Mâael Na Mbâo   (O'CHEINNSELAIG) Murchada, was 36 and his mother, Aife Ingen Gilla Patraic, was 31. He married Darbforgaill O'Brien in 1034, in Leinster, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 7 February 1072, in Ireland, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Diarmait MacMáil na mBó King of Leinster and Ireland est né environ 0995, à Diocese of Dublin, Irlande, son père, Donnchad Mâael Na Mbâo   (O'CHEINNSELAIG) Murchada, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Aife Ingen Gilla Patraic, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Darbforgaill O'Brien en 1034, à Leinster, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 7 février 1072, à Irlande, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Diarmait MacMáil na mBó King of Leinster and Ireland um 0995 in Diocese of Dublin, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Donnchad Mâael Na Mbâo   (O'CHEINNSELAIG) Murchada 36 und seine Mutter Aife Ingen Gilla Patraic 31. Er hat 1034 in Leinster, Irland Darbforgaill O'Brien geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 7. Februar 1072 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Diarmait MacMáil na mBó King of Leinster and Ireland è nato il circa 0995 nel Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda, il suo padre, Donnchad Mâael Na Mbâo   (O'CHEINNSELAIG) Murchada, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Aife Ingen Gilla Patraic, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Darbforgaill O'Brien nel 1034, nel Leinster, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 febbraio 1072, nel Irlanda, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.Diocese of Dublin, Leinster, Ireland: アイルランドディオセゼ オフ ダブリン
ja.Leinster Province, Ireland: アイルランドレインスター
ja.slain by the Meath men at Donlah: オーストラリアクイーンスランドメアス
ja.Dublin, Ireland: アイルランドダブリン
ja.Leinster, Ireland: アイルランドレインスター
ja.lifeSummary: Diarmait MacMáil na mBó King of Leinster and Irelandが約0995年にアイルランドディオセゼ オフ ダブリンで生まれた時，父Donnchad Mâael Na Mbâo   (O'CHEINNSELAIG) Murchadaは36歳，母Aife Ingen Gilla Patraicは31歳であった。1034年にアイルランドレインスターでDarbforgaill O'Brienと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1072年2月7日にアイルランドで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Diarmait MacMáil na mBó King of Leinster and Ireland(이)가 대략 0995년 아일랜드 디오스스 프 드블린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Donnchad Mâael Na Mbâo   (O'CHEINNSELAIG) Murchada(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Aife Ingen Gilla Patraic(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1034년 아일랜드 레인스터에서 Darbforgaill O'Brien(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1072년 2월 7일 아일랜드에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Diarmait MacMáil na mBó King of Leinster and Ireland nasceu aproximadamente 0995, em Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda, seu pai, Donnchad Mâael Na Mbâo   (O'CHEINNSELAIG) Murchada, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Aife Ingen Gilla Patraic, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Darbforgaill O'Brien em 1034, em Leinster, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 7 de fevereiro de 1072, em Irlanda, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Diarmait MacMáil na mBó King of Leinster and Ireland родился около 0995 г. в местности диосес оф дублинь, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Donnchad Mâael Na Mbâo   (O'CHEINNSELAIG) Murchada было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Aife Ingen Gilla Patraic, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Darbforgaill O'Brien в 1034 г. в местности линстир, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 7 февраля 1072 г. в местности Ирландия в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Diarmait MacMáil na mBó King of Leinster and Ireland nació aproximadamente 0995, en Diocese of Dublin, Irlanda, su papá, Donnchad Mâael Na Mbâo   (O'CHEINNSELAIG) Murchada, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Aife Ingen Gilla Patraic, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Darbforgaill O'Brien en 1034, en Leinster, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de febrero de 1072, en Irlanda, a la edad de 78 años.
